sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15128" key="a)ristopoii/+a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀριστο-ποιΐα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n15128.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">preparation of breakfast,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0648.tlg001.perseus-grc1:12:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Onos.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
